health_score.label: Health Score
health_score.description: 0–100 composite score that summarizes how well a feature is documented, currently behaving, and actively used.
health_score.intro: Used as a single quality signal for triage and quick ranking.

health_grade.label: Health Grade
health_grade.description: Letter grade derived from Health Score.

values.A: score ≥ 90 — fully documented, healthy, used recently
values.D: score < 60 — poor, likely undocumented or drifting

psi.label: Population Stability Index (PSI)
psi.description: Measures distribution shift between baseline and current data. Higher PSI indicates stronger drift.
psi.intro: Common drift metric for monitoring quality stability.

drift_severity.label: Drift Severity
drift_severity.description: Severity bucket assigned to monitoring check output.

values.warning: moderate PSI drift, null spike, or range violation
values.critical: large PSI drift, multiple anomalies, or hard failure
values.unknown: no baseline / no recent check available

completeness.label: Completeness
completeness.description: Ratio of non-null values in current data compared to baseline. Helps detect null spikes and source regressions.

values.low: High null rate relative to baseline; verify source quality or upstream logic.
values.medium: Some increase in nulls; monitor closely.

quality_score.label: Quality Score
quality_score.description: Signal of how rich a feature's metadata is during discovery (name clarity, dtype, and sample stats).
quality_score.intro: Higher quality generally means better discovery ranking and fewer guesswork decisions.

values.low: Sparse metadata; lower ranking in discovery.
values.medium: Useful metadata with some missing context.
values.high: Clear metadata and strong recommendation confidence.

monitoring_status.label: Monitoring Status
monitoring_status.description: Aggregate status across recent monitoring runs for a feature or group: healthy / warning / critical.

action_item.label: Action Item
action_item.description: Tracked recommendation persisted in the catalog, from monitoring, AI, autodoc, or manual assignment.
action_item.intro: Use actions to avoid recommendations being lost in team handoffs.
